title: (Bearish Signal) AMRS, Aroon Indicator entered a Downtrend on April 27, 2021.
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
For the last three days, Tickeron's A.I.dvisor has detected that AMRS's AroonDown red line is above 70 while the AroonUp green line is below 30 for three straight days. This move could indicate a strong downtrend ahead for AMRS, and traders may view it as a Sell signal for the next month. Traders may consider selling the stock or exploring put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested this indicator and found 171 similar cases, 148 of which were successful. Based on this data, the odds of success are 87%. Current price $14.81 crossed the resistance line at $14.49 and is trading between $21.48 support and $14.49 resistance lines. Throughout the month of 03/29/21 - 04/29/21, the price experienced a -21% Downtrend. During the week of 04/22/21 - 04/29/21, the stock fell -3%.

https://preview.redd.it/gwxdd98w8cw61.png?width=1525&format=png&auto=webp&s=30f494a60f43ac0883c0d29352417064ce108bec

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved below the 0 level on April 27, 2021. You may want to consider selling the stock, shorting the stock, or exploring put options on AMRS as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 70 of 84 cases where the Momentum Indicator fell below 0, the stock fell further within the subsequent month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 83%.

AMRS moved below its 50-day Moving Average on April 12, 2021 date and that indicates a change from an upward trend to a downward trend.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where AMRS declined for three days, the price rose further in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 86%.

The Aroon Indicator for AMRS entered a downward trend on April 29, 2021. This could indicate a strong downward move is ahead for the stock. Traders may want to consider selling the stock or buying put options.

[Full information about signal](https://tickeron.com/news/10821925-amyris-s-amrs-15-18-aroon-indicator-entered-a-downtrend-on-april-27-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=blog)
